feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Publish RFQ from custom behavior class save method
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement to develop custom application in HANA Public Cloud where user selects specific supplier to approve then it should automatically publish RFQ. Lo_http_client being generated but session getting terminated at lo_http_client->execute method and not catching at exceptions. Request your valuable inputs to take it forward. below is the sample code for your reference written in Behavior save/create method. Thank you
 
lo_url = 'https://{hostname}/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_RFQ_PROCESS_SRV/SubmitForApproval?RequestForQuotation='7000000010''

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(

i_destination = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( lo_url ) ).
Try

DATA(lo_response) = lo_http_client->execute(

i_method = if_web_http_client=>post ).

CATCH cx_web_message_error cx_web_http_client_error cx_http_dest_provider_error. "#EC NO_HANDLER

" data(lv_msg) = lo_Response->get_text( ).

ENDTRY.

entry.title: Update S4 Hana Public Cloud - Outbound Delivery Header and Item using standard APIs
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am using the standard API (Outbound Delivery (A2X)) from the standard communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106". In this API we are attempting the PATCH request to update the outbound delivery and the request endpoint and body of the request are as below

I want to update the "Shipping Notes for Customer" value in the Header, which is a notes field.

At the item level, I want to update the Item Quantity. 

https://myxxxxxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV/A_OutbDeliveryHeader('xxxxxxxx')

Body:

{    "CustomerShippingInstruction": "Handle with care",    "DeliveryDocumentItem": [        {            "DeliveryDocument": "xxxxxxxx",            "DeliveryDocumentItem": "10",            "ActualDeliveryQuantity": "25.000"        }    ]} 

In the request header parameter, I am passing the x-csrf-token value I attained from the GET request. I am using user-based authentication and below are the user credentials

I am receiving the "403 Forbidden Request" response for the above request. How I can handle this request and I need to fix this as soon as possible.

Needs to fix this and get the update call working to the outbound deliveries in to the system. Currently testing this in POSTMAN.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: 過帳規則無法自動產生
entry.content:
HI All

我目前在建立YBM1類型的生產訂單時出現過帳規則無法自動產生的錯誤訊息，錯誤代碼是CO630，

結算：無法自動建立分配規則
訊息號碼 CO630

Diagnosis
The distribution rule could not be created automatically. When a production order is created, the system tries to create a distribution rule automatically. If this is not possible there may be several explanations, for example:

the settlement profile for your order type does not permit the recipient for whom a distribution rule is to be created automatically
several recipients are entered as compulsory recipients for the settlement profile
the material that is produced is not valuated. Therefore the system cannot generate a distribution rule with the recipient material.
For an operation-related posting the automatic creation of the distribution rule is a prerequisite since the manual creation of the distribution rule is not supported.

Procedure
Check which of the above reasons is true and change your settlement profile if necessary. If an order is to be created for a material without valuation then the distribution rule must be maintained manually.

我使用的是標準的工單類型YBM1，理論上應該是能夠自動產生過帳規則，想問一下是甚麼原因導致的?

另外想問一下這個過帳規則該怎麼指派給生產訂單?在IMG"定義生產訂單類型"裡面沒有看到相對應的欄位，

謝謝。

entry.title: 匯入財務計畫數據問題
entry.content:
HI All

想請教我已經透過APP"匯入財務計畫數據" 將EPPM專案的計畫數據上傳到ERP中，

我能夠在APP"顯示財務計畫資料"中看到我上傳的結果，但我無法在APP"專案 計畫/實際"的報表中看到我上傳的結果，

我選擇的兩個規劃種類分別是PLN(計劃)及CPM，

謝謝。

entry.title: 專案庫存銷售
entry.content:
HI All

情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

有參考了論壇上的問題"Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)"中提到的內容，

但遇到一樣的問題無法在出貨時選到專案庫存Q的存貨，但在庫存概觀等報表中是能夠看到專案庫存的，

謝謝。

entry.title: Change Documents List for TRM transactions
entry.content:
• In current system SAP ECC, they configure that certain items cannot be changed after settlement for TRM transactions.
  • In S/4 HC we cannot configure same as ECC so almost all items can be changed even after settlement for TRM transactions.
  • It is the original issue, but we understand it cannot be solved in a short time, so we have investigated a workaround for this issue. 
  • For the workaround, at least we need Change Documents List Report. 
  • We understand that we can display Change Documents for each Transaction one by one, but it cannot be the solution because users cannot check one by one and there is a major internal audit problem.
  • We believe you understand the issue and will provide Change Documents List Report like ECC and/or additional solutions.
    Please let me know your plans and schedule.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: shipment approval process for sales orders 銷售訂單出貨審核
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to ask if there is a shipment approval process for sales orders. To reduce discrepancies between picking quantities and order quantities, we hope to add a shipment review step.

When shipping, we use the "Create Outbound Deliveries" and "Pick Outbound Delivery" apps. Is it possible to add a shipment review process between these steps?

Thank you!

entry.title: Integration from SAP Sales Cloud V2 to S4HC Public Edition
entry.content:
(1) I would like to know that is it possible to configure the integration between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using standard APIs? If yes, could you please recommend me any API or reference link? I already searched in API Hub portal but can't find required API.

Required API lists from sales cloud v2 to s4hana public cloud:
1. Sales Quote Integration
2. Sales Order Integration
3. Opportunity to create Project in S4HANA
4. Price List Integration
5. Product Integration
6. Account Integration

(2) And which APIs are recommended to execute Sales Orders and Sales Quotes from SAP Sales Cloud V2?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud- Create Custom Business Object and Custom Reusable Elements
entry.content:
Introduction

Hello, in this blog I will show you how to create custom business object (CBO) and custom reusable elements in S4/Hana public cloud. Then I will show you again what the code list I created in the custom reusable element does in the custom business object and why we created it.

Additional Information

Custom business objects help create business objects with SAP S/4Hana Cloud's user interface for extending data model fields, adding things like custom columns and calculation logic. With Custom Reusable Elements, you can customize the structure you create according to your needs and install it accordingly.

Custom Reusable Elements

Here I will create a house for sale ad example in the custom business object (CBO). The code list here will give us information about home types when we create an ad. First, let's create a custom code list from the custom reusable element.

Figure-1

You can follow the images below to create the creation phase. After these steps, we are done with custom reusable for now.

Figure-2

Figure-3

Custom Business Object

We move on to creating our example in the custom business object. Here again, you can follow the steps in the image.

Figure-4

Figure-5

It is necessary to select these boxes when creating a custom business object. These boxes have the following meanings in numerical order:

  • 1-Determination and Validation: It enables the business object (Create, edit, save) to have logic added. It is employed for both validation and the presentation of error messages. This can only be used when custom business object (CBO) is in publish status.
  • 2-User Interface: It makes an interface for maintenance. Comparable to SM30. The maintenance interface needs to be set to a custom catalog in order to be used.
  • 3-Back End Service: It generates an OData API that the SAP S/4HANA system can use. Communication Arrangements can be established following the creation of the API. This also applies to SAP/S4HANA Cloud, and we may use SAP BAS to develop a new Fiori application. CRUD operations are also within our capabilities. With SAP S/4HANA On-Premise, we may use SAP Cloud Connector to make the generated OData accessible.
  • 4-System Administrative Data: Additional fields are created when this option is checked. The creation date, creator, last modified date, and last modified are these extra fields. When a user creates a new business item, these fields are automatically filled up.

Figure-6

In the field section, you specify which fields you want to see in this house-ad table. In the picture, we use the house_type we created in custom reusable as the type of the house_type label. After selecting the type here, you can see the code list we created from the code list text on the right.Figure-7

In the Node section, when we run the last application, we will see that the house is a field.

Figure-8

You can also go to the fields section and select the node and add the fields of the node we added. After completing all the steps, you need to publish what you have done. After publishing, you can see what you have done in the log section.

Figure-9

Figure-10

After the publish phase, you need to perform operations numbered 1 and 2 from the general information section. These operations are;

  • 1. Maintain Catalogs: This is used to add the application to the catalog and create a box. When finished, it shows up in the launchpad and is allocated to the user.
  • 2. Go To Generated UI: This opens once it is fully published. brings up the user interface.

Figure-11

Selecting the Maintain catalog, you can select the catalog you want to add by clicking add on this screen and publish it. If you want, you can also create a custom catalog yourself, assign it to it and publish it. After publishing, when you click go to Generated UI, the application opens as an interface. Figure-12

Figure-13

Figure-14

You can open the application here by clicking Generated UI again. At the same time, you can go to the app finder, find the catalog you added the application to and add it to launchpad.

Figure-15

Figure-16

I created an example. Here you can see what the code list we created earlier and used in the fields does when creating an example.

Figure-17

Conclusion

As a result, today I showed you how to create a custom business object(CBO) and how to create a custom code list in a custom reusable element. Then I showed you again what the code list I created in a custom reusable element does in a custom business object and why we created it. I hope it will be useful for you.

entry.title: Customer:Ctry-Spec.Enh. tab is missing in the Business Partner
entry.content:
Customer:Ctry-Spec.Enh. tab is missing in the Business Partner

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to add a filter to an "overview page" fiori application ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

My customer, running a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition system, would like to add a filter to fiori application "Quality Engineer Overview" (F2360, which is a "SAP Fiori elements: Overview Page" kind of fiori application). The new filter to add should correspond to the Material's group:

Would this be possible please?

I tried checking but: 

- not possible to do anything with the UI adaptation mode other than changing the cards themselves (hide some or change of their attributes)

- SAP Fiori library says that Fiori app F2360 can be modified with "sap ui5 adaptation project" but would this fulfill my requirement?

Thank you all for your help

entry.title: Workcenter capacity based on total hours on a period
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are currently in the middle of our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation project, and we are exploring solutions for a precise need described as follow :

Our industry is mainly based on manual assembly, where many of our operations are not constrainted by a precise sequence and can be performed in parallel by multiple people or one after the other regarding the day-to-day priorities of each individual project.

In this context, we need to be able to manage a global capacity for our people workcenters, based on the sum of hours described in our routing operations (regardless of the fact that they are sequential or parallel) and a start/stop date for each production order. Assuming that hours are equally spread for each workcenter inside a PO.

Is there a way in our version of S/4HANA to manage global workcenter capacity based on total hours spread inside our production orders VS workcenter total capacity ? In order to detect workcenters overload.

Our production managers expect this capacity management to be available directly inside the ERP, instead of having to extract theorical hours from our orders and put it in MS Project for this particular purpose.

I thank you very much for your help and time.

Best regards,

Maxime

entry.title: Get Application Job Status of a Periodic Job
entry.content:
I've scheduled a periodic application job using method cl_apj_rt_api=>schedule_job.

Now, I'd like to check the status of the periodic job. I use method cl_apj_rt_api=>get_job_status by passing the jobname and jobcount but it only gives me the status of the very first job scheduled. I would like to also find out the status of the succeeding job or at least the latest one.

Are there any ways to check the status of a period application job programmatically?

entry.title: CDS View or API of purchasing price condition data (Table A160/A161 in ECC)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently trying to find a CDS view for the purchasing condition table A160 and A161 to create a report to show the data of these 2 tables in S4 hana public cloud system. The data is created by <MEK1: Create condition records: Purchasing for configurable materials>, the data structure in table A160/A161 is similar to the purchasing info record data in table A017/A018. But I just couldn't find any AXXX table of price condition in S4 hana public cloud.

And we also tried to use Odata API <Technical name: API_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV>, but we did not see how to get condition record data based on <Supplier/ plant/ purchase organization/ purchasing info record category/ material/ variant condition>.

here is the API reference link: Condition Record for Pricing in Purchasing | SAP Help Portal

Could you guys help if you know of any CDS view or API that i can use to achieve this requirement. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Pull Header text of Purchase Requisition to Purchase Order in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please provide details, how to Pull Header text of Purchase Requisition to Purchase Order Header Text in SAP Public cloud.

Thanks & Regards,

Tharun.

entry.title: Serialized product stock upload into WM using migration template
entry.content: While uploading stock for serialized material into warehouse bin, it is throwing error:Serial numbers not allowed in non-serialized product (000001)

entry.title: Universal Allocation on the basis of revenue
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to  do margin analysis overhead allocation by giving variable portion in the rules. It is not fetching the receiver data after doing Test run .I am not able to allocate the cost  on the basis of revenue to the product. Proposed me a solution relevant to this.

entry.title: Cost Centers and Distribution Cycle with SKF
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our client (handling in public construction projects like roads, parks etc. working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud) has raised the following requirements, expecting your expert opinion on these matters.

  1. Client needs to know employee-wise cost to company, is there any alternative to get the cost details other than creating each employee as a Cost Center.
  2. If employee and asset-wise cost center is not a viable option, then please suggest on how we can address the following situation:
    1. Client needs to know the employee wise cost in each WBS element. In the App, Manage Cost Rates- Actuals, how can we give these rate (since the combination of Cost Center- Activity Type is required)? Same is applicable with Assets. (Workers are already been grouped in Success Factor based on their grades and designation, still the pay scale of employees within the same group is different. Same is applicable with Assets, there is grouping available but within the group, the cost rate varies.)

    2. Through the App, Manage Direct Activity Allocation, how we can give the actual hours spent by employees and assets on each WBS elements.

  3. There are indirect cost like Training charges, Repairs and all, which needs to be distributed to WBS elements based on hours spent by each employees on each WBS elements and asset used in each WBS elements. The option currently tried is having Distribution Cycles where sender is employee wise/ asset wise cost center with concerned expense GL account, receiver is WBS, receiver rule is Variable Portions and Receiver Tracing Factor is Statistical Key Figure- Actuals. Every employee and asset is been created as separate SKFs and given the values. But, on cycle run, the common cost is being distributed based on the total hours booked on each WBS and not based on employee-wise WBS. Is there any alternative to get the amount distributed based on employee wise hours and asset wise hours?Thanks in advance

entry.title: Deployment Error : 403 error in Fiori App deployed in S4Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP-ians,

I am currently working on an integration project between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and a External API. 
I am facing an issue with my Fiori app deployed on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. The app is working fine locally, but when deployed on the cloud, I am encountering a 403 Forbidden error when attempting to access backend data.

The solution involves the following steps:

  1. CDS and CAP Application:

    • I have created a Core Data Services (CDS) view in public cloud and consumed it in SAP BTP Business Application Studio (BAS).
    • I have developed a CAP application where I consumed the CDS OData service and implemented the backend logic for posting data to the External API.

  2. Deployment to SAP BTP:

    • The CAP backend is deployed to Cloud Foundry in SAP BTP, and I have created a destination for the deployed BAS service URL, which I am using to connect the Fiori app to the backend.
    • I have also tested my CAP backend service in Postman it is working fine.

       


      In Cap Destination I have also tried using the Authentication type as OAuth2clientCredentials.

  3. Fiori App Development:

    • I created a Fiori app that consumes the backend data from the CAP application. (the Fiori and CAPM are two different Projects in BAS).
    • The app works fine when running locally in the SAP BTP BAS environment. I'm able to interact with the external API through CAP backend as expected.

       

  4. Deployment to S/4HANA Public Cloud:

    • I successfully deployed the Fiori app as a Fiori tile to the S/4HANA Public Cloud.
    • In public Cloud, While accessing the deployed Application, the UI of the app loads correctly, I am facing a 403 error when trying to access the backend data (while loading the metadata of the backend).

       

  5. IAM and Authorization:

    • While Deployment, I have created the IAM App in ADT for the app, but since I am using a CAP backend (not RAP), I am unsure of how to bind the service of CAP to the Application to resolve the 403 error. Typically, the RAP service is bound to the app to resolve such issues, but since I am not using RAP, I need guidance on how to handle this scenario. I didn't added any services to this APP.

       

    • Additionally, I see a UAA roles is created in BTP environment up on deployment of CAPM application, if I assign the role to user will it resolve this 403 error.

       

My Questions:

  • What could be causing the 403 error when accessing the CAP backend from the deployed Fiori app on S/4HANA Public Cloud? is it due to lack of authorization or roles in BTP?
  • Are there specific configurations or steps I need to follow when using a CAP backend instead of RAP for Fiori apps deployed on S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • Is there any option available to import the CAP service to ABAP environment so that I could add the CAP service to application in IAM?
  • How can I resolve the 403 error and ensure that the Fiori app can access the backend data?
  • Will the error resolve if I assign the UAA roles to the respective User in BTP?

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Many Thanks in Advance!


Best Regards,
Arasu

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA ,SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Dual control sensitive fields for vendor master in sap
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We have a requirement for vendor master data changes that need to go through an approval process. To facilitate this, we have activated the dual control sensitive fields for the vendor master.

Currently, when changes are made to the vendor master, the system prompts for confirmation of the sensitive fields by another user. However, the system is still allowing PO creation even if the changes in the vendor master fields have not been approved through TCode FK08.

Is there a solution to ensure that POs cannot be created for vendors with unapproved master data changes?

Looking forward to your guidance. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.@sandeep_kumar

 

Regards, 

Mohammed Nafees
